violations.text: The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

The floors in dry food storage area, walk in cooler, and walk in freezer have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (loading dock) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
Faucet handle on mop sink observed in poor repair(leakage).PIC put in work order to have repaired New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the garage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
